iti74:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti74:2.1: “Monks, there are these three types of sons & daughters existing in the world.
iti74:2.3: One of heightened birth, one of similar birth, one of lowered birth.
iti74:3.1: “And how is a son or daughter of heightened birth?
iti74:3.2: There is the case where a son or daughter’s parents have not gone to the Buddha for refuge,
iti74:3.3: have not gone to the Dhamma for refuge, have not gone to the Saṅgha for refuge.
iti74:3.4:
They do not abstain from taking life, from stealing, from sexual misconduct,
from false speech, from fermented & distilled liquors that cause heedlessness.
They are unprincipled & evil by nature.
iti74:3.5: However, their son or daughter has gone to the Buddha for refuge,
iti74:3.6: has gone to the Dhamma for refuge, has gone to the Saṅgha for refuge.
iti74:3.7:
He/she abstains from taking life, from stealing, from sexual misconduct,
from false speech, from fermented & distilled liquors that cause heedlessness.
He/she is principled & admirable by nature.
iti74:3.8: This is called a son or daughter of heightened birth.
iti74:4.1: “And how is a son or daughter of similar birth?
iti74:4.2: There is the case where a son or daughter’s parents have gone to the Buddha for refuge,
iti74:4.3: have gone to the Dhamma for refuge, have gone to the Saṅgha for refuge.
iti74:4.4:
They abstain from taking life, from stealing, from sexual misconduct,
from false speech, from fermented & distilled liquors that cause heedlessness.
They are principled & admirable by nature.
iti74:4.5: Their son or daughter has also gone to the Buddha for refuge,
iti74:4.6: has gone to the Dhamma for refuge, has gone to the Saṅgha for refuge.
iti74:4.7:
He/she abstains from taking life, from stealing, from sexual misconduct,
from false speech, from fermented & distilled liquors that cause heedlessness.
He/she is principled & admirable by nature.
iti74:4.8: This is called a son or daughter of similar birth.
iti74:5.1: “And how is a son or daughter of lowered birth?
iti74:5.2: There is the case where a son or daughter’s parents have gone to the Buddha for refuge,
iti74:5.3: have gone to the Dhamma for refuge, have gone to the Saṅgha for refuge.
iti74:5.4:
They abstain from taking life, from stealing, from sexual misconduct,
from false speech, from fermented & distilled liquors that cause heedlessness.
They are principled & admirable by nature.
iti74:5.5: However, their son or daughter has not gone to the Buddha for refuge,
iti74:5.6: has not gone to the Dhamma for refuge, has not gone to the Saṅgha for refuge.
iti74:5.7:
He/she does not abstain from taking life, from stealing, from sexual misconduct,
from false speech, from fermented & distilled liquors that cause heedlessness.
He/she is unprincipled & evil by nature.
iti74:5.8:
This is called a son or daughter of lowered birth.”
The wise hope for a child
iti74:6.3: not for one of lowered birth,
iti74:7.6: like the moon when freed from a cloud.
